steps.title: Combine x terms
steps.content: Add $x$ to both sides of $13x=112-x$ to gather all $x$-terms on the left: $$14x=112.$$

steps.title: Solve for x
steps.content: Divide both sides by $14$: $x=\tfrac{112}{14}=8$. The answer is 8.

steps.title: Use the source rationale
steps.content: The correct answer is $8$. Adding $x$ to both sides of the given equation yields $14x=112$. Dividing both sides of this equation by $14$ yields $x=8$.
